Require Import Stdlib.Lists.List.
Import ListNotations.
Require Import Stdlib.Arith.PeanoNat.
From Coq Require Import Lia.
Require Import Stdlib.Logic.FunctionalExtensionality.
Require Import Stdlib.PArith.BinPos.
Require Import Stdlib.PArith.Pnat.
Axiom todo : forall {A : Type}, A.

(* ================================================================= *)
(* === Inlined from VFA Maps: total_map, t_empty, t_update       === *)
(* ================================================================= *)

Definition total_map (A : Type) : Type := nat -> A.

Definition t_empty {A : Type} (v : A) : total_map A := fun _ => v.

Definition t_update {A : Type} (m : total_map A) (x : nat) (v : A) : total_map A :=
  fun x' => if x =? x' then v else m x'.

(* ================================================================= *)
(* === Trie data structure (from VFA Trie, using stdlib positive) === *)
(* ================================================================= *)

Inductive trie (A : Type) :=
| Leaf : trie A
| Node : trie A -> A -> trie A -> trie A.

Arguments Leaf {A}.
Arguments Node {A} _ _ _.

Definition trie_table (A : Type) : Type := (A * trie A)%type.

Definition empty {A : Type} (default : A) : trie_table A := (default, Leaf).

Fixpoint look {A : Type} (default : A) (i : positive) (m : trie A) : A :=
  match m with
  | Leaf => default
  | Node l x r =>
    match i with
    | xH    => x
    | xO i' => look default i' l
    | xI i' => look default i' r
    end
  end.

Definition lookup {A : Type} (i : positive) (t : trie_table A) : A :=
  look (fst t) i (snd t).

Fixpoint ins {A : Type} (default : A) (i : positive) (a : A) (m : trie A) : trie A :=
  match m with
  | Leaf =>
    match i with
    | xH    => Node Leaf a Leaf
    | xO i' => Node (ins default i' a Leaf) default Leaf
    | xI i' => Node Leaf default (ins default i' a Leaf)
    end
  | Node l o r =>
    match i with
    | xH    => Node l a r
    | xO i' => Node (ins default i' a l) o r
    | xI i' => Node l o (ins default i' a r)
    end
  end.

Definition insert {A : Type} (i : positive) (a : A) (t : trie_table A) : trie_table A :=
  (fst t, ins (fst t) i a (snd t)).

(* === Bijection between positive and nat (given with proofs) === *)

Definition nat2pos (n : nat) : positive := Pos.of_succ_nat n.
Definition pos2nat (p : positive) : nat := pred (Pos.to_nat p).

Lemma pos2nat2pos : forall p, nat2pos (pos2nat p) = p.
Proof.
  intro. unfold nat2pos, pos2nat.
  rewrite <- (Pos2Nat.id p) at 2.
  destruct (Pos.to_nat p) eqn:?.
  - pose proof (Pos2Nat.is_pos p). lia.
  - rewrite <- Pos.of_nat_succ. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma nat2pos2nat : forall i, pos2nat (nat2pos i) = i.
Proof.
  intro. unfold nat2pos, pos2nat.
  rewrite SuccNat2Pos.id_succ. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma look_leaf : forall A (a : A) j, look a j Leaf = a.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma look_ins_same : forall {A} (a : A) k v t,
  look a k (ins a k v t) = v.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma look_ins_other : forall {A} (a : A) j k v t,
  j <> k -> look a j (ins a k v t) = look a j t.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma pos2nat_injective : forall p q, pos2nat p = pos2nat q -> p = q.
Proof.
  intros p q H.
  rewrite <- (pos2nat2pos p).
  rewrite <- (pos2nat2pos q).
  rewrite H. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma nat2pos_injective : forall i j, nat2pos i = nat2pos j -> i = j.
Proof. Admitted.

Definition is_trie {A : Type} (t : trie_table A) : Prop := True.

Definition abstract {A : Type} (t : trie_table A) (n : nat) : A :=
  lookup (nat2pos n) t.

Definition Abs {A : Type} (t : trie_table A) (m : total_map A) :=
  abstract t = m.

Theorem empty_is_trie : forall {A} (default : A), is_trie (empty default).
Proof. constructor. Qed.

Theorem insert_is_trie : forall {A} i x (t : trie_table A),
  is_trie t -> is_trie (insert i x t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem empty_relate : forall {A} (default : A),
  Abs (empty default) (t_empty default).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem lookup_relate : forall {A} i (t : trie_table A) m,
  is_trie t -> Abs t m -> lookup i t = m (pos2nat i).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem insert_relate : forall {A} k (v : A) t cts,
  is_trie t -> Abs t cts ->
  Abs (insert k v t) (t_update cts (pos2nat k) v).
Proof. Admitted.

diff_user_message.system:
You are an expert Coq proof engineer performing correct-by-construction
synthesis: simultaneously building an implementation AND its proof of
correctness.

## Goal

The .v file contains:
- `Axiom todo : forall {A : Type}, A.` — typed hole for unfinished expressions
- A function signature with `todo` as the body.
- A lemma stating the specification of the function which is `Admitted.` —
  placeholder for an unfinished proof.

Your goal: fill every `todo`, and prove every lemma marked `Admitted.` with
`Qed.` After your edit, the file MUST compile with `coqc`. In particular, the
function should be fully implemented, and the lemma should prove its correctness.

We want to synthesize the program and generate its proof step by step in the
deductive synthesis style. You will be called multiple times. You are STRICTLY
FORBIDDEN from taking multiple steps or generating the full solution in one call.

In each call, **replace exactly one `todo` with an expression and prove its
corresponding lemma**. Fill a `todo` with one concrete expression:
   - A value: `true`, `0`, `nil`, etc.
   - A pattern match: `match x with | C1 => todo | C2 y => todo end`
   - A conditional: `if cond then todo else todo`
   - A recursive or function call
   Note that all the sub-expressions are `todo`.
   Leave all other `todo`s untouched.
   Add sub-lemmas (with appropriate preconditions) for any new `todo`
   expression, and declare them as `Admitted.` If the expression is a leaf,
   no new sub-lemma is declared.
   Use the sub-lemmas to prove the lemma for the filled `todo` expression
   (`Admitted.` → `Qed.`).
   Example: `Definition f : (nat -> bool) := todo.` becomes
   `Fixpoint f (n : nat) : bool := match n with | O => todo | S m => todo end.`
   and the main lemma for `f` is proved by induction using the sub-lemmas for
   the `todo`s in the base and inductive cases, which are declared `Admitted.`

If there are standalone `Admitted.` lemmas with no corresponding `todo`
(all expressions already filled), you may prove one such lemma directly.
When choosing which `Admitted.` lemma to prove, prefer ones that do NOT
depend on other `Admitted.` lemmas — prove prerequisites first.

## Proof Strategy

When a proof attempt does not go through, consider:
- `remember` to generalize a term before `induction` or `destruct`
- `generalize dependent` to strengthen the induction hypothesis
- Inducting on evidence (`induction H`) rather than on the term
- Introducing helper lemmas about list/nat structure

## Rules

- The file MUST compile with `coqc` after every edit.
- Do NOT remove or rename existing lemmas/theorems, or change their statements.
  Only fill in proofs.
- Do NOT use `exact todo.` or a similar trivial tactic to close a proof —
  that defeats the purpose. Only close proofs with real tactics.
- Do NOT replace multiple `todo`s in one call.
- Do NOT prove multiple `Admitted.` lemmas in one call.
- Add `Require Import` statements as needed.

## Scoring

score = Qed / (Qed + Admitted + todo).
- Doesn't compile → 0 (you will see the coqc error and can retry).
- Compiles, no Admitted, no todo → 1.0 (done).

You will be called for up to 100 iterations.

Require Import Stdlib.Lists.List.
Import ListNotations.
Require Import Stdlib.Arith.PeanoNat.
From Coq Require Import Lia.
Require Import Stdlib.Logic.FunctionalExtensionality.
Require Import Stdlib.PArith.BinPos.
Require Import Stdlib.PArith.Pnat.
Axiom todo : forall {A : Type}, A.

(* ================================================================= *)
(* === Inlined from VFA Maps: total_map, t_empty, t_update       === *)
(* ================================================================= *)

Definition total_map (A : Type) : Type := nat -> A.

Definition t_empty {A : Type} (v : A) : total_map A := fun _ => v.

Definition t_update {A : Type} (m : total_map A) (x : nat) (v : A) : total_map A :=
  fun x' => if x =? x' then v else m x'.

(* ================================================================= *)
(* === Trie data structure (from VFA Trie, using stdlib positive) === *)
(* ================================================================= *)

Inductive trie (A : Type) :=
| Leaf : trie A
| Node : trie A -> A -> trie A -> trie A.

Arguments Leaf {A}.
Arguments Node {A} _ _ _.

Definition trie_table (A : Type) : Type := (A * trie A)%type.

Definition empty {A : Type} (default : A) : trie_table A := (default, Leaf).

Fixpoint look {A : Type} (default : A) (i : positive) (m : trie A) : A :=
  match m with
  | Leaf => default
  | Node l x r =>
    match i with
    | xH    => x
    | xO i' => look default i' l
    | xI i' => look default i' r
    end
  end.

Definition lookup {A : Type} (i : positive) (t : trie_table A) : A :=
  look (fst t) i (snd t).

Fixpoint ins {A : Type} (default : A) (i : positive) (a : A) (m : trie A) : trie A :=
  match m with
  | Leaf =>
    match i with
    | xH    => Node Leaf a Leaf
    | xO i' => Node (ins default i' a Leaf) default Leaf
    | xI i' => Node Leaf default (ins default i' a Leaf)
    end
  | Node l o r =>
    match i with
    | xH    => Node l a r
    | xO i' => Node (ins default i' a l) o r
    | xI i' => Node l o (ins default i' a r)
    end
  end.

Definition insert {A : Type} (i : positive) (a : A) (t : trie_table A) : trie_table A :=
  (fst t, ins (fst t) i a (snd t)).

(* === Bijection between positive and nat (given with proofs) === *)

Definition nat2pos (n : nat) : positive := Pos.of_succ_nat n.
Definition pos2nat (p : positive) : nat := pred (Pos.to_nat p).

Lemma pos2nat2pos : forall p, nat2pos (pos2nat p) = p.
Proof.
  intro. unfold nat2pos, pos2nat.
  rewrite <- (Pos2Nat.id p) at 2.
  destruct (Pos.to_nat p) eqn:?.
  - pose proof (Pos2Nat.is_pos p). lia.
  - rewrite <- Pos.of_nat_succ. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma nat2pos2nat : forall i, pos2nat (nat2pos i) = i.
Proof.
  intro. unfold nat2pos, pos2nat.
  rewrite SuccNat2Pos.id_succ. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma look_leaf : forall A (a : A) j, look a j Leaf = a.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma look_ins_same : forall {A} (a : A) k v t,
  look a k (ins a k v t) = v.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma look_ins_other : forall {A} (a : A) j k v t,
  j <> k -> look a j (ins a k v t) = look a j t.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma pos2nat_injective : forall p q, pos2nat p = pos2nat q -> p = q.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma nat2pos_injective : forall i j, nat2pos i = nat2pos j -> i = j.
Proof. Admitted.

Definition is_trie {A : Type} (t : trie_table A) : Prop := todo.

Definition abstract {A : Type} (t : trie_table A) (n : nat) : A :=
  lookup (nat2pos n) t.

Definition Abs {A : Type} (t : trie_table A) (m : total_map A) :=
  abstract t = m.

Theorem empty_is_trie : forall {A} (default : A), is_trie (empty default).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem insert_is_trie : forall {A} i x (t : trie_table A),
  is_trie t -> is_trie (insert i x t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem empty_relate : forall {A} (default : A),
  Abs (empty default) (t_empty default).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem lookup_relate : forall {A} i (t : trie_table A) m,
  is_trie t -> Abs t m -> lookup i t = m (pos2nat i).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem insert_relate : forall {A} k (v : A) t cts,
  is_trie t -> Abs t cts ->
  Abs (insert k v t) (t_update cts (pos2nat k) v).
Proof. Admitted.

(* ================================================================= *)
(* === Inlined from VFA Maps: total_map, t_empty, t_update       === *)

Definition total_map (A : Type) : Type := nat -> A.

Definition t_update {A : Type} (m : total_map A) (x : nat) (v : A) : total_map A :=
  fun x' => if x =? x' then v else m x'.

(* ================================================================= *)
(* === Trie data structure (from VFA Trie, using stdlib positive) === *)
(* ================================================================= *)

Inductive trie (A : Type) :=
| Leaf : trie A
| Node : trie A -> A -> trie A -> trie A.

Arguments Leaf {A}.
Arguments Node {A} _ _ _.

Definition trie_table (A : Type) : Type := (A * trie A)%type.

Definition empty {A : Type} (default : A) : trie_table A := (default, Leaf).

Fixpoint look {A : Type} (default : A) (i : positive) (m : trie A) : A :=
  match m with
  | Leaf => default
  | Node l x r =>
    match i with
    | xH    => x
    | xO i' => look default i' l
    | xI i' => look default i' r
    end
  end.

Definition lookup {A : Type} (i : positive) (t : trie_table A) : A :=
  look (fst t) i (snd t).

Fixpoint ins {A : Type} (default : A) (i : positive) (a : A) (m : trie A) : trie A :=
  match m with
  | Leaf =>
    match i with
    | xH    => Node Leaf a Leaf
    | xO i' => Node (ins default i' a Leaf) default Leaf
    | xI i' => Node Leaf default (ins default i' a Leaf)
    end
  | Node l o r =>
    match i with
    | xH    => Node l a r
    | xO i' => Node (ins default i' a l) o r
    | xI i' => Node l o (ins default i' a r)
    end
  end.

Definition insert {A : Type} (i : positive) (a : A) (t : trie_table A) : trie_table A :=
  (fst t, ins (fst t) i a (snd t)).

(* === Bijection between positive and nat (given with proofs) === *)

Definition nat2pos (n : nat) : positive := Pos.of_succ_nat n.
Definition pos2nat (p : positive) : nat := pred (Pos.to_nat p).

Lemma pos2nat2pos : forall p, nat2pos (pos2nat p) = p.
Proof.
  intro. unfold nat2pos, pos2nat.
  rewrite <- (Pos2Nat.id p) at 2.
  destruct (Pos.to_nat p) eqn:?.
  - pose proof (Pos2Nat.is_pos p). lia.
  - rewrite <- Pos.of_nat_succ. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma nat2pos2nat : forall i, pos2nat (nat2pos i) = i.
Proof.
  intro. unfold nat2pos, pos2nat.
  rewrite SuccNat2Pos.id_succ. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma look_leaf : forall A (a : A) j, look a j Leaf = a.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma look_ins_same : forall {A} (a : A) k v t,
  look a k (ins a k v t) = v.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma look_ins_other : forall {A} (a : A) j k v t,
  j <> k -> look a j (ins a k v t) = look a j t.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma pos2nat_injective : forall p q, pos2nat p = pos2nat q -> p = q.
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma nat2pos_injective : forall i j, nat2pos i = nat2pos j -> i = j.
Proof. Admitted.

Definition is_trie {A : Type} (t : trie_table A) : Prop := True.

Definition abstract {A : Type} (t : trie_table A) (n : nat) : A :=
  lookup (nat2pos n) t.

Definition Abs {A : Type} (t : trie_table A) (m : total_map A) :=
  abstract t = m.

Theorem empty_is_trie : forall {A} (default : A), is_trie (empty default).
Proof.
  constructor.
Qed.

Theorem insert_is_trie : forall {A} i x (t : trie_table A),
  is_trie t -> is_trie (insert i x t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem empty_relate : forall {A} (default : A),
  Abs (empty default) (t_empty default).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem lookup_relate : forall {A} i (t : trie_table A) m,
  is_trie t -> Abs t m -> lookup i t = m (pos2nat i).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem insert_relate : forall {A} k (v : A) t cts,
  is_trie t -> Abs t cts ->
  Abs (insert k v t) (t_update cts (pos2nat k) v).
Proof. Admitted.

## EVALUATOR FEEDBACK ON CURRENT PROGRAM
The evaluator analyzed cases where the current program failed and produced the following diagnostic feedback. Use this to make targeted improvements:

9 obligation(s) remain: 9 Admitted proof(s), 0 todo expression(s). All expressions are filled. Prove one Admitted lemma with Qed.

# Task
Suggest improvements to the program that will improve its COMBINED_SCORE.
The system maintains diversity across these dimensions: score, complexity.
Different solutions with similar combined_score but different features are valuable.

You MUST use the exact SEARCH/REPLACE diff format shown below to indicate changes:

<<<<<<< SEARCH
# Original code to find and replace (must match exactly)
=======
# New replacement code
>>>>>>> REPLACE

Example of valid diff format:
<<<<<<< SEARCH
for i in range(m):
    for j in range(p):

Lemma pos2nat_injective : forall p q, pos2nat p = pos2nat q -> p = q.
Proof.
  intros p q H.
  rewrite <- (pos2nat2pos p).
  rewrite <- (pos2nat2pos q).
  rewrite H. reflexivity.
Qed.
